question_types: Performance-Based (hands-on tasks in live Kubernetes/Linux environment)

testing_centers.notes: Online proctored only via PSI secure browser. No in-person testing centers.

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name must match registration. Must show ID to proctor via webcam.
exam_rules: Performance-based: open terminal environment. One additional browser tab allowed (for kubernetes.io docs, GitHub kubernetes docs, helm.sh only for CKA/CKAD/CKS). No other external resources. Must be alone in quiet room. No notes. Proctor monitors via webcam and screen share.
renewal_options: Retake the exam before the certification expires.

prerequisites.description: Understanding of Kubernetes basics before attempting

retake_policy.notes: One free retake included with exam registration. No waiting period between attempts. After 2 attempts, full repurchase required.

official_study_resources.title: Linux Foundation Training
official_study_resources.notes: Official instructor-led and self-paced courses aligned to each cert
